global_attrs.name: ECMWF AIFS Single forecast
global_attrs.description: Weather forecasts from the ECMWF Artificial Intelligence Forecasting System (AIFS) Single model.
global_attrs.attribution: ECMWF AIFS Single forecast data processed by dynamical.org from ECMWF Open Data.
global_attrs.forecast_domain: Forecast lead time 0-360 hours (0-15 days) ahead

attrs.comment: Average precipitation rate since the previous forecast step. Units equivalent to mm/s.

This coordinate reference system matches the source data which follows WMO conventions of assuming the earth is a perfect sphere with a radius of 6,371,229m. It is similar to EPSG:4326, but EPSG:4326 uses a more accurate representation of the earth's shape.

global_attrs.name: ECMWF AIFS Single forecast
global_attrs.description: Weather forecasts from the ECMWF Artificial Intelligence Forecasting System (AIFS) Single model.
global_attrs.attribution: ECMWF AIFS Single forecast data processed by dynamical.org from ECMWF Open Data.
global_attrs.forecast_domain: Forecast lead time 0-360 hours (0-15 days) ahead
global_attrs.spatial_grid_note: Same 0.25 degree Canary bbox as /mnt/data/canairy_meteo/data/aifs_single monthly files.
global_attrs.feature_legality_rule: Use expanded fields by init_time + lead_time/lead_hour. Valid-time-only joins are diagnostic unless source issue time is retained.
global_attrs.materialized_fields: dew_point_temperature_2m, downward_long_wave_radiation_flux_surface, downward_short_wave_radiation_flux_surface, pressure_surface, temperature_850hpa, temperature_925hpa, geopotential_height_500hpa, geopotential_height_850hpa, geopotential_height_925hpa

attrs.comment: This coordinate reference system matches the source data which follows WMO conventions of assuming the earth is a perfect sphere with a radius of 6,371,229m. It is similar to EPSG:4326, but EPSG:4326 uses a more accurate representation of the earth's shape.

attrs.legality_definition: valid_time = init_time + lead_time; do not use without issue/init time.

attrs.legality_note: valid_time is legal only together with init_time and lead_hour.
